task_statement: CR.v3 P2 support repair: Gemini-local axis/evidence QA returned fenced JSON with observed_evidence as a mapping of nested evidence objects, but AgentFact.returned.observed_evidence recorded [] because support/connection/adapter_grant_policy.py::_mapping_to_text_list drops non-string mapping values. Repair the return-field normalization so required list fields preserve non-secret nested mapping/list/scalar evidence as deterministic text, without creating new AgentFact fields, Movement, success/quality authority, provider runtime, scheduler, or credential storage. Add focused checker/profile coverage proving observed_evidence mapping values with nested objects are not dropped, existing evidence_refs/not_proven/proof_limits merge behavior remains text-safe, forbidden/secret handling still holds, and Gemini fenced JSON can land non-empty observed_evidence.

nodes.work_statement: Implement the narrow support repair for adapter return-field normalization. Evidence: Building cr-v3-p2-first-use-adapters-official-replay-0628b Gemini step output had output_excerpt containing fenced JSON with observed_evidence object values, but returned.observed_evidence was []. Change only support normalization/checker surfaces needed to preserve nested mapping/list values as deterministic text for list return fields. Do not change Agent/Brick/Link meaning, do not add Movement or authority, do not store secrets/session ids.

Run read/probe-only Codex QA on the normalization repair. Inspect changed files and run direct probes: fenced JSON containing observed_evidence as nested mapping must produce non-empty observed_evidence list through _extract_required_return_fields/_merge_structured_return_fields; evidence_refs/not_proven/proof_limits mapping merge remains text-safe; secret/session rejection remains intact; git diff --check. Do not source-mutate.

Run Gemini-local axis/evidence QA on the normalization repair. Inspect carried work and Codex QA evidence. Check Brick/Agent/Link separation: support may normalize returned evidence shape but must not invent facts, choose Movement, judge success/quality, store credentials, or mutate Agent/Brick/Link resources. Return non-empty observed_evidence. If inspection is impossible, put the exact reason in not_proven; do not return an empty observed_evidence field.

Close the normalization repair only after inspecting work, Codex QA, Gemini QA, raw/report delivery, and changed files. If Gemini QA returned.observed_evidence is still empty, report HOLD/NOT_PROVEN. Do not claim source truth, success, quality, or Movement authority.
